message:
feat(storage): write batching + WAL checkpoint for periodic maintenance

Replace expensive VACUUM with lightweight PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(PASSIVE)
+ PRAGMA optimize for periodic maintenance. Add write batching in the
writer thread: drain pending commands with try_recv() and wrap batches
in BEGIN IMMEDIATE/COMMIT to amortize journal overhead.

- CheckpointResult struct + checkpoint_sync() for WAL + optimize
- StorageHandle::checkpoint() async method
- writer_loop refactored: batch drain (up to 128), transaction wrapping
- dispatch_write_command() extracted for clarity
- Control commands (Shutdown/Vacuum/Checkpoint) commit before running
- Maintenance task uses checkpoint() instead of vacuum()
- 7 new tests: checkpoint result/idempotent/many-writes, vacuum compat,
  concurrent batching, ordering, sync function direct

Closes wa-upg.5.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
